recommendations.title: From Prada to Nada
recommendations.overview: Two spoiled Beverly Hills sisters who have been left penniless after their father's sudden death are forced to move in with their estranged aunt in East Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: Midnight Lace
recommendations.overview: Kit Preston begins to unravel when she receives threatening telephone calls informing her she's soon to be murdered.

recommendations.title: Berlin Calling
recommendations.overview: A man tours clubs around the globe with his manager and girlfriend. On the eve of their largest album release he is admitted to a psychiatric clinic after overdosing at a gig.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Lou!
recommendations.overview: Lou, a creative and dreamy 12-year-old girl, lives alone with her mother in an orange building with tons of little balconies that give access to the roof. Mina has been her best friend since kindergarten, and Lou has been in love with Tristan, one of

recommendations.title: Sublime
recommendations.overview: Admitted to Mt. Abaddon Hospital for a routine procedure, George Grieves discovers that his condition is much more serious and complicated than originally expected; and as his own fears begin to manifest around him, he learns that Mt. Abaddon is not

recommendations.title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
recommendations.overview: A young family moves into a historic home in Georgia, only to learn they are not the house's only inhabitants. Soon they find themselves in the presence of a secret rising from underground and threatening to bring down anyone in its path.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Will
recommendations.overview: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. When they die, they have to be judged by Christ, the Devil and the Virgin Mary before they are admitted

recommendations.title: Home Again
recommendations.overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.

recommendations.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
recommendations.overview: Stranded in Egypt, Bud and Lou find themselves in the buried tomb of a living mummy.
